name: Leaseweb Cloud and Hosting API
what_it_does: Global hosting and cloud provider with REST API — enabling enterprises to provision and manage dedicated servers, virtual private servers, bare metal cloud, private cloud, and CDN resources via API, with particular strength in European data centers, high-bandwidth connectivity, and GDPR-compliant hosting at competitive pricing.
use_cases: Provisioning Leaseweb dedicated servers and VPS via API for automated infrastructure deployment
Managing Leaseweb bare metal cloud instances via API for high-performance compute automation
Configuring Leaseweb network settings and IPs via API for infrastructure-as-code workflows
Managing Leaseweb customer accounts and services via API for MSP and reseller automation
Querying Leaseweb server metrics and bandwidth via API for infrastructure monitoring
not_for: Hyperscaler services (AWS/GCP/Azure managed services — Leaseweb is IaaS/hosting focused)
Kubernetes managed services (use EKS, GKE, or AKS)
Developers needing developer-friendly PaaS (use Railway, Render, or Fly.io)
best_when: An enterprise or MSP needs European GDPR-compliant dedicated servers, bare metal cloud, or high-bandwidth hosting at competitive pricing — with a REST API for infrastructure automation.
avoid_when: You need managed services (RDS, Lambda, etc.), developer-friendly PaaS, or prefer AWS/Azure/GCP ecosystem integration.

auth.notes: API key from Leaseweb customer portal. x-lsw-auth header authentication. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API key provides full account access. Webhook for server and service events. REST API with OpenAPI documentation. No SDK provided officially. Account-level API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise hosting pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Dedicated servers from €29/month; VPS from €4.99/month; Bare metal cloud hourly pricing; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Dutch company (Amsterdam). Founded 1997. Privately held. One of Europe's largest hosting providers. 80,000+ servers globally. Data centers in Netherlands, Germany, USA, Singapore, Australia, Japan. 20+ Tbps bandwidth capacity. Strong in European enterprise hosting. GDPR-compliant (Dutch jurisdiction). Used by media companies, game publishers, e-commerce. CDN service included. 24/7 support. ISO27001 certified. NEN 7510 (Dutch healthcare). Known for competitive bandwidth pricing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI docs at developer.leaseweb.com. x-lsw-auth header auth. Webhook for service events. No SDK. GDPR and ISO27001 compliant. Dutch company. Rate limits not documented. Primarily IaaS — less developer-friendly than PaaS alternatives.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Server reads idempotent by server ID. VPS reads idempotent. Network config reads idempotent. Server creation not idempotent — check by name. Power operations idempotent for same desired state.
known_agent_gotchas: x-lsw-auth header — non-standard auth header name
Dedicated server provisioning takes hours — not suitable for fast auto-scaling
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency API calls
IaaS focused — no managed services like RDS or Lambda
Billing model varies by product type (hourly vs monthly) — check per product

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant (Dutch jurisdiction). ISO27001 certified. NEN 7510 for healthcare. x-lsw-auth API key auth. No OAuth2 or scope granularity. API key provides full account access. Dutch privacy law (stricter than GDPR baseline). Physical data center security with biometric access. ISO27001 for ISMS.
